title: callicarpa mollis
intro: Callicarpa mollis, also known as the velvet-leafed jabberberry or soft callicarpa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant's leaves and stems contain medicinal compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callicarpa mollis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
